scoring_rubric.business_importance: 1-5: launch criticality for c1v v1.0 ship
scoring_rubric.user_frequency: 1-5: how often the use case runs in production
scoring_rubric.functional_uniqueness: 1-5: distinct software functions exercised that no other UC touches

ranked_use_cases.name: Generate Spec from One-Sentence Idea
ranked_use_cases.business_importance_rationale: Headline c1v use case — cannot ship v1.0 without conversational idea→spec path.
ranked_use_cases.user_frequency_rationale: Every new project starts here; the primary entry point for the Founders persona.
ranked_use_cases.functional_uniqueness_rationale: Only use case exercising conversational intake + LLM agent orchestration + <<include>> on UC08 (metric-traceback); it is the load-bearing flow.

ranked_use_cases.name: Trace Tech-Stack Recommendation to Metric
ranked_use_cases.business_importance_rationale: Hard-constraint anchor — Module 1 declares 'every tech-stack recommendation must trace to a declared performance metric.' Non-ship without this.
ranked_use_cases.user_frequency_rationale: Invoked every time UC01 or UC06 emits a tech-stack recommendation; effectively runs on every spec cycle.
ranked_use_cases.functional_uniqueness_rationale: Only use case that exercises citation resolution, metric-to-recommendation binding, and auditable source linking — new subsystem boundary for c1v.

ranked_use_cases.name: Recommend Design Improvements
ranked_use_cases.business_importance_rationale: Headline live-feedback-loop use case. Cannot ship 'feedback loop that recommends improvements' without this.
ranked_use_cases.user_frequency_rationale: Continuous — runs whenever the ingestion window closes on live metrics (hourly to daily cadence).
ranked_use_cases.functional_uniqueness_rationale: Only use case operating on live-metric windows + recommendation ranking + feedback-loop state; <<include>> on UC05 covers ingestion.

ranked_use_cases.name: Emit CLI Commands from Spec
ranked_use_cases.business_importance_rationale: Hard output of the spec pipeline — 'CLI commands' named explicitly in the c1v need statement.
ranked_use_cases.user_frequency_rationale: Runs each time a spec reaches approved status; downstream of UC03.
ranked_use_cases.functional_uniqueness_rationale: Only use case emitting SKILL.md + CLAUDE.md + MCP tool bundles; distinct export surface to IDE/CLI clients.

ranked_use_cases.name: Connect Existing Customer System
ranked_use_cases.business_importance_rationale: Hard-constraint anchor — Module 1 declares 'Must run alongside existing customer production systems without disruption (native, non-invasive integration).' Without UC11, the non-invasive promise is unshippable.
ranked_use_cases.user_frequency_rationale: Invoked once per customer-system onboarding, then periodically for re-auth/refresh.
ranked_use_cases.functional_uniqueness_rationale: Only use case exercising non-invasive read-first connector to VCS + telemetry + IdP simultaneously; only UC with overhead-budget constraint.

ranked_use_cases.name: Review Generated Spec
ranked_use_cases.business_importance_rationale: Required for multi-persona workflow (Founders → PMs). Not strictly launch-blocking in solo-founder flow but required for team use.
ranked_use_cases.user_frequency_rationale: Runs once per spec cycle (every UC01 or UC02 output goes through review).
ranked_use_cases.functional_uniqueness_rationale: Only use case exercising approval/rejection/revision state machine with comments; <<include>> on UC14 covers auth.

deferred_use_cases.name: Generate Spec from Existing Codebase
deferred_use_cases.reason_deferred: High standalone score (business 5, freq 3, uniqueness 5), but the UCBD step flow is ~80% shared with UC01 (boundary inference differs, the rest collapses into UC01's pipeline). Revisit in Phase 11 expansion to capture the codebase-parsing variance as UC01-delta, not a full re-author.

deferred_use_cases.name: Ingest Live Performance Metrics
deferred_use_cases.reason_deferred: Entirely covered as <<include>> in UC06. The UCBD of UC06 will capture the ingestion leg via a single step row; standalone UCBD is redundant at first pass.
deferred_use_cases.revisit_phase: Module 2 Phase 11 expansion if M6 Interfaces calls for a dedicated telemetry-connector interface spec

deferred_use_cases.name: Proactively Surface Features
deferred_use_cases.reason_deferred: <<extends>> UC06 — incremental functional delta over the recommendation ranker. Covered as a branching step in UC06 UCBD.
deferred_use_cases.revisit_phase: Module 2 Phase 11 expansion once UC06 is stable

deferred_use_cases.name: Audit Spec Trail for Compliance
deferred_use_cases.reason_deferred: Cross-cutting concern (CC) — the audit surface is shared infrastructure written by every protected action in UC01/UC03/UC04/UC06/UC11. The standalone 'export evidence pack' UCBD is a Module 7 / compliance-flow concern; first-pass M2 captures audit requirements as CC.R entries on the requirements table.
deferred_use_cases.revisit_phase: Module 2 Phase 11 expansion or Module 7 FMEA

deferred_use_cases.name: Coordinate Team Work Against Spec
deferred_use_cases.reason_deferred: Collaboration flow overlaps UC03 (review state machine). Distinct value (task-status reconciliation) is incremental and benefits from first-pass UC03 stability before expansion.

deferred_use_cases.name: Export Spec to Downstream Tools
deferred_use_cases.reason_deferred: Export targets (git, GH Actions, Jira) vary; UCBD would fragment into N format-specific flows. First-pass M2 captures the export requirement as CC.R entries; Phase 11 can model the canonical flow once downstream targets are frozen.
deferred_use_cases.revisit_phase: Module 2 Phase 11 expansion after target enumeration is finalized

deferred_use_cases.name: Configure LLM Provider
deferred_use_cases.reason_deferred: Admin configuration flow; distinct functional surface but low uniqueness once generic settings-mutation requirements are captured as CC.R entries.
deferred_use_cases.revisit_phase: Module 2 Phase 11 expansion or Module 6 Interfaces (LLM provider interface matrix)

deferred_use_cases.name: Authenticate via Identity Provider
deferred_use_cases.reason_deferred: Cross-cutting — every human-initiated UC begins with UC14 as <<include>>. Captured as CC.R entries (session, token, role binding). Standalone UCBD is redundant.

deferred_use_cases.name: Onboard New Team Member
deferred_use_cases.reason_deferred: Composition of UC13 + UC14 with provisioning overlay. Incremental; Phase 11 expansion after the base two are diagrammed.

hard_constraints_anchored.constraint: Must run alongside existing customer production systems without disruption (non-invasive)
Must produce auditable specs — every artifact traceable to source
hard_constraints_anchored.anchored_by: UC08 (also CC.R entries for every UC)

hard_constraints_anchored.constraint: Must trace every tech-stack recommendation to a declared performance metric
Must operate across multiple LLM providers; no single-vendor lock-in
hard_constraints_anchored.anchored_by: UC01 (indirectly via UC13 which is deferred; surfaced as CC.R)

hard_constraints_anchored.constraint: Must integrate with version control, CI/CD, IDE/CLI clients, and observability tools without custom connectors per customer
hard_constraints_anchored.anchored_by: UC04 (IDE/CLI) + UC11 (VCS + telemetry); CI/CD via CC.R

open_questions: Write-back semantics for UC06 — I will author the step flow assuming v1 is read-only (suggest-only). If v1.1 is write-through, UC06 step flow changes materially.
Should UC14 be promoted to a first-pass UCBD to give IdP integration a named flow, or is CC.R treatment sufficient?
